TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Peru = Gaga kska Kska- Hunac Meycow ka Peru, 10 00 S, 76 00 W ka gaga na nniqan. Kana ka knlbangan na o 1,285,216 sq km(hangan na o Tg20) (knlbanga dxgal o 1,279,996 sq km, knlbangan qsiya o 5,220 sq km). Kana ka sejiqun o niqan 30,741,062 hiyi. Gaga Lima ka pusu alang paru, jiyax 28 idas 7 ka jiyax skrayan klwaan. Manu ka dxgal Peru ga wada sugan 18.80% ka dxgal qpahan, 53% ka dxgal bbuyu, rahuq dxgal do niqan 28.20% na. Bukung klwaan ta sayang o kiya ka Pedro Pablo Kuczynski, pnaah hngkawas2016 idas 7 jiyax 28pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: = pəɾu = gaga kska kska- ħunaʦ məʦow ka pəɾu, ** ** s, ** ** w ka gaga na nniqan. kana ka knlbaŋan na o *,***,*** sq km(ħaŋan na o tg**) (knlbaŋa dxgal o *,***,*** sq km, knlbaŋan qsija o *,*** sq km). kana ka səɟiqun o niqan **,***,*** ħiji. gaga lima ka pusu alaŋ paɾu, ɟijax ** idas * ka ɟijax skɾajan klwaan. manu ka dxgal pəɾu ga wada sugan **.**% ka dxgal qpaħan, **% ka dxgal bbuju, ɾaħuq dxgal do niqan **.**% na. bukuŋ klwaan ta sajaŋ o kija ka pədɾo pablo kuʦ*jnski, pnaaħ ħŋkawas**** idas * ɟijax **pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan. ʦinkħulan sa knita' sa bɾbiɾu'
S.FORM: = Peru = Gaga kska Kska- Hunac Meycow ka Peru, 10 00 S, 76 00 W ka gaga na nniqan. Kana ka knlbangan na o 1,285,216 sq km(hangan na o Tg20) (knlbanga dxgal o 1,279,996 sq km, knlbangan qsiya o 5,220 sq km). Kana ka sejiqun o niqan 30,741,062 hiyi. Gaga Lima ka pusu alang paru, jiyax 28 idas 7 ka jiyax skrayan klwaan. Manu ka dxgal Peru ga wada sugan 18.80% ka dxgal qpahan, 53% ka dxgal bbuyu, rahuq dxgal do niqan 28.20% na. Bukung klwaan ta sayang o kiya ka Pedro Pablo Kuczynski, pnaah hngkawas2016 idas 7 jiyax 28pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: = pəɾu = gaga kska kska- ħunaʦ məʦow ka pəɾu, ** ** s, ** ** w ka gaga na nniqan. kana ka knlbaŋan na o *,***,*** sq km(ħaŋan na o tg**) (knlbaŋa dxgal o *,***,*** sq km, knlbaŋan qsija o *,*** sq km). kana ka səɟiqun o niqan **,***,*** ħiji. gaga lima ka pusu alaŋ paɾu, ɟijax ** idas * ka ɟijax skɾajan klwaan. manu ka dxgal pəɾu ga wada sugan **.**% ka dxgal qpaħan, **% ka dxgal bbuju, ɾaħuq dxgal do niqan **.**% na. bukuŋ klwaan ta sajaŋ o kija ka pədɾo pablo kuʦ*jnski, pnaaħ ħŋkawas**** idas * ɟijax **pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan. ʦinkħulan sa knita' sa bɾbiɾu'
